Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Ahmad Sofi-Mahmudi. Author, maintainer.

  • Johannes Textor. Author.

  • Benito van der Zander. Author.

  • Ankur Ankan. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Textor J, van der Zander B, Gilthorpe M, Liśkiewicz M, Ellison G (2016). “Robust causal inference using directed acyclic graphs: the R package 'dagitty'.” International Journal of Epidemiology, 45(6), 1887–1894. doi:10.1093/ije/dyw341. 

@Article{,
  title = {Robust causal inference using directed acyclic graphs: the R package 'dagitty'},
  journal = {International Journal of Epidemiology},
  author = {Johannes Textor and Benito {van der Zander} and Mark S Gilthorpe and Maciej Li\'{s}kiewicz and George TH Ellison},
  volume = {45},
  number = {6},
  pages = {1887--1894},
  year = {2016},
  doi = {10.1093/ije/dyw341},
}

Ankan A, Wortel I, Textor J (2021). “Testing Graphical Causal Models Using the R Package 'dagitty'.” Current Protocols, 1(2), e45. doi:10.1002/cpz1.45. 

@Article{,
  title = {Testing Graphical Causal Models Using the R Package 'dagitty'},
  journal = {Current Protocols},
  author = {Ankur Ankan and Inge M N Wortel and Johannes Textor},
  volume = {1},
  number = {2},
  pages = {e45},
  year = {2021},
  doi = {10.1002/cpz1.45},
}
